arts.ttl: Champions League | Bologna v Lille: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Bologna’s squad depth is being tested as they prepare for their upcoming Champions League match against Lille. The Italian side is grappling with several absences, including long-term injuries to Nicolo Cambiaghi and Oussama El Azzouzi. Swiss internationals Michel Aebischer and Dan Ndoye are also sidelined, with Ndoye suffering a shin injury just before the international break. Goalkeeper Lukasz Skorupski missed Bologna’s recent Serie A fixture due to illness, potentially opening the door for Federico Ravaglia to start.
